subject: Physical Education
chapter: Physical Education and Sports for CWSN

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Sports for CWSN are designed to promote their physical fitness and health.
questions.reason: Reason (R): The sports are modified to meet the special needs of CWSN, making them accessible and safe for their participation.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Sports for CWSN are designed to promote their physical fitness and health, and this is achieved by modifying the sports to meet their special needs.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): CWSN are encouraged to participate in games and sports as a means of rehabilitation.
questions.reason: Reason (R): Physical activity helps in overcoming the effects of disability and promotes overall well-being.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: CWSN are encouraged to participate in games and sports as a means of rehabilitation, and this is because physical activity helps in overcoming the effects of disability and promotes overall well-being.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Sports for CWSN are organized at the national level.
questions.reason: Reason (R): The National Sports Federation for CWSN organizes national-level competitions.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The statement is true because sports for CWSN are indeed organized at the national level, and this is facilitated by the National Sports Federation for CWSN.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): CWSN are provided with equal opportunities to participate in sports and games.

(C) A is true but R is false

questions.explanation: CWSN are indeed provided with equal opportunities to participate in sports and games, and this is because the government has implemented various schemes to promote sports among CWSN.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Sports for CWSN are a means of social integration.
questions.reason: Reason (R): CWSN participate in sports alongside their able-bodied counterparts, promoting social interaction and understanding.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A

(C) A is true but R is false

questions.explanation: While sports for CWSN are indeed a means of social integration, the reason provided is not the correct explanation.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): CWSN are eligible to participate in the Paralympic Games.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): CWSN are not eligible for participation in the Olympic Games.

opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
